name: tmobile-upgrade-tracker-backend
description: Convenience runner for the three upgrade-tracker microservices

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix account-service install && npm --prefix device-service install && npm --prefix upgrade-service install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n account,device,upgrade -c magenta,cyan,green "npm --prefix account-service run dev" "npm --prefix device-service run dev" "npm --prefix upgrade-service run dev"
